channel.title: Open Source Signal / Сигнал відкритих джерел
channel.description: A bilingual OSINT editorial radar for investigations, verification, maps, platforms, surveillance and researcher safety.

item.title: Open Source Signal / Сигнал відкритих джерел #001
item.description: Daily issue #001: influence-operation infrastructure, AI-assisted cyber workflows, the surveillance marketplace, movement-data OPSEC, SAR damage mapping, coded platform signals and an extremist-network casefile.

item.title: Open Source Signal / Сигнал відкритих джерел #000
item.description: A visual prototype for the daily digest: editorial cards, color-coded rubrics, source links, Ukrainian adaptations and internal notes separated from the public layer. No cyberpunk fog machine, no “OSINT ninja” confetti. Just signal.
